zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Burley於大約1370年出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親Sir Roger Burley36歲，母親Lucy Gilford31歲。她於大約1390年與Roger Burley結婚。她去世於1436年8月30日在英國多瑟特維其哈普頓享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Burley于大约1370年出生在英国素可阿盧德爾时，她的父亲Sir Roger Burley36岁，母亲Lucy Gilford31岁。她于大约1390年与Roger Burley结婚。她去世于1436年8月30日在英国多瑟特維其哈普頓享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Burley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Burley, for example in Hampshire, Rutland, Shropshire, and Yorkshire, from Old English burh ‘fortified manor, stronghold’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of Swiss German Bürli: from a diminutive of būr ‘peasant, farmer’ (see Bauer ).

variants.name: Berley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Burley  . This surname is now rare in Britain. It may also be a variant of   Birley  .
Americanized form of Swiss German Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of their South German cognate Behrle or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Barley .

variants.name: Birley
meanings: English: habitational name from Birley in Ecclesfield (Yorkshire), East or North Bierley (Yorkshire), or Birley (Derbyshire).

variants.name: Burlew
meanings: Probably a variant of   Burley   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Burley was born about 1370, in Arundel, Sussex, England, her father, Sir Roger Burley, was 36 and her mother, Lucy Gilford, was 31. She married Roger Burley about 1390. She died on 30 August 1436, in Witchampton, Dorset, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Burley est née environ 1370, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Burley, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lucy Gilford, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Burley environ 1390. Elle est décédée le 30 août 1436, à Witchampton, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Burley um 1370 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger Burley 36 und ihre Mutter Lucy Gilford 31. Sie hat um 1390 Roger Burley geheiratet. Sie starb am 30. August 1436 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Witchampton, Dorset, England und wurde in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Burley è nata il circa 1370 nel Arundel, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir Roger Burley, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lucy Gilford, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Roger Burley circa 1390. Morì il 30 agosto 1436, nel Witchampton, Dorset, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Worcester, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Burleyが約1370年にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Burleyは36歳，母Lucy Gilfordは31歳であった。約1390年にRoger Burleyと結婚した。彼女は1436年8月30日にイギリスドールセトウィトチャンプトンで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Burley(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger Burley(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy Gilford(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1390년 Roger Burley(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1436년 8월 30일 영국 도르세트 윗챔프턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Burley nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Burley, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Gilford, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Burley aproximadamente 1390. Ela faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1436, em Witchampton, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Burley родилась около 1370 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Roger Burley было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Gilford, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Burley около 1390 г. Она умерла 30 августа 1436 г. в местности вичамптон, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Burley nació aproximadamente 1370, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Burley, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lucy Gilford, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Roger Burley aproximadamente 1390. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1436, en Witchampton, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
